entry_contract: IN/OUT/OUT_BY or MT5 numeric 0/1/3; INOUT is refused
normalization_contract: divide each lifecycle cashflow by RISK_PERCENT at entry
ownership_contract: export must include every opening deal needed to resolve position_id; magic=0 broker closes inherit opening magic
time_contract: UTC timestamp with explicit offset, or Unix epoch seconds
type_contract: BUY/SELL or MT5 numeric 0/1; account balance rows are excluded
